text: “Under the influence” means impaired to a degree that renders a person incapable of safely driving or exercising actual physical control of a vehicle.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.105 — “Under the influence” defined.

“Under the influence” means impaired to a degree that renders a person incapable of safely driving or exercising actual physical control of a vehicle.

subsections.text: “Under the influence” means impaired to a degree that renders a person incapable of safely driving or exercising actual physical control of a vehicle.
